mapper.select:
SELECT BD_ID, BD_TYPE, BD_TITLE, BD_WRITER, BD_REGDATE, BD_VIEWCNT, BD_SECYN, BD_CONT FROM TBL_BOARD WHERE BD_DELYN = 'N'
AND BD_TYPE = #{bdType}
AND BD_REGDATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND BD_REGDATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND BD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND BD_WRITER LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY BD_ID DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD SET BD_VIEWCNT = BD_VIEWCNT +1 WHERE BD_ID = #{bdId}
mapper.select: SELECT A.BD_ID, A.BD_TYPE, A.BD_TITLE, A.BD_WRITER, A.BD_CONT, A.BD_REGDATE, A.BD_MODDATE, A.BD_VIEWCNT, A.BD_SECYN, B.* FROM TBL_BOARD A LEFT OUTER JOIN ATTACHMENTS B ON TO_CHAR(A.BD_ID) = B.REF_ID WHERE A.BD_ID = #{bdId} AND A.BD_DELYN = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT "TEAM2_202508F"."SEQ_BOARD_ID".NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO tbl_board ( bd_id, bd_type, bd_title, bd_cont, bd_writer, bd_secyn ) VALUES ( #{bdId}, #{bdType}, #{bdTitle}, #{bdCont}, #{bdWriter}, #{bdSecyn} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_board SET bd_delyn='Y' WHERE bd_id= #{bdId}
